title: Radhakrishn - Punar Milan
desc: Krishna decides to take Ganesha with him to Dwarka for instilling knowledge within him. Meanwhile, Radha prepares an ostentatious feast for his welcome.

title: Radhakrishn - Punar Milan
desc: Ganesha's team of mice find out the Modaks prepared by Radha. Later, to evade Krishna's questions about the Sudarshan Chakra, Ganesha avoids him.

title: Radhakrishn - Punar Milan
desc: After hearing about Krishna's escapades with stealing butter, Ganesha tries it himself. He then uses his mice team and steals all the butter from Dwarka.

title: Radhakrishn - Punar Milan
desc: When Krishna asks about the butter thief, a guilty Ganesha frames Krishna. Later, he tells Ganesha a story to make him realise his mistake.
